# ===============================================================================
# TEMPLATE: Banco de Momentos v3.0 (Compact MD)
# Purpose: Top 50 mined moments — human-readable, AI-parseable
# Generated by: content-miner-pro (ATHENA-MEK v2.0 + Selection & Compaction)
# Format: Structured Markdown with YAML frontmatter
# Script: python squads/curator/scripts/generate_compact_mining.py
# ===============================================================================

# INSTRUCTIONS:
# This template defines the STRUCTURE of the compact output.
# The actual file is generated by squads/curator/scripts/generate_compact_mining.py
# Variables in {BRACKETS} are filled by the script.

# ===============================================================================
# STRUCTURE
# ===============================================================================

# --- YAML FRONTMATTER ---
# ```
# ---
# source: "{SOURCE_NAME}"
# speaker_principal: "{MAIN_SPEAKER}"
# speakers: "{SPEAKER_1}, {SPEAKER_2}, ..."
# duration: "{HH:MM:SS}"
# duration_seconds: {N}
# mined_at: "{YYYY-MM-DD}"
# miner: content-miner-pro v2.0 (ATHENA-MEK)
# total_mined: {N}          # ALL moments extracted
# top_selected: {N}         # Moments in this file (max 50)
# selection_criteria: "impact_score >= 9 (top 50)"
# content_duration_seconds: {N}
# coverage_percent: {N.N}
# full_archive: "_temp/mining/{source-slug}/all_moments_merged.md"
# ---
# ```

# --- BODY SECTIONS ---

# ## Metricas
# | Metrica | Valor |
# |---------|-------|
# | Total minerado | {N} momentos |
# | Selecionados (top) | {N} momentos |
# | Duracao selecionada | {N}s ({N.N} min) |
# | Cobertura | {N.N}% |
# | Q1 (0:00-{Q1_END}) | {N} momentos ({N.N}%) |
# | Q2 ({Q1_END}-{Q2_END}) | {N} momentos ({N.N}%) |
# | Q3 ({Q2_END}-{Q3_END}) | {N} momentos ({N.N}%) |
# | Q4 ({Q3_END}-{END}) | {N} momentos ({N.N}%) |

# ## Distribuicao
# **Por Tipo:**
# - hook: {N}
# - insight: {N}
# - story: {N}
# - quote: {N}
#
# **Por Gatilho Viral:**
# - especifico: {N}
# - transformacao: {N}
# - contraintuitivo: {N}
# - quebra: {N}
# - lacuna: {N}
# - pico: {N}
# - controversia: {N}

# ## Quick Scan
# | # | Timestamp | Dur | Tipo | Gatilho | MQR | Score | Assunto | Speaker |
# |---|-----------|-----|------|---------|-----|-------|---------|---------|
# | 1 | {INICIO}-{FIM} | {N}s | {TIPO} | {GATILHO} | {H{n}/E{n}/S{n}/C{n}} | {SCORE} | {ASSUNTO} | {SPEAKER} |
# | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

# ## Rankings
# ### Top Hooks (Shorts-ready)
# **[{TIMESTAMP}]** {ASSUNTO} (score {N})
# > {PREVIEW}...
#
# ### Top Insights (Carrossel/LinkedIn)
# ### Top Quotes (Quote Cards)
# ### Top Stories (Longform)

# ---
# ## Momentos Selecionados
# ### #{N} | {TIPO} | {GATILHO} | Score {N}
# **Timestamp:** {INICIO} - {FIM} ({N}s)
# **Assunto:** {ASSUNTO}
# **Speaker:** {SPEAKER}
# **MQR:** {H{n}/E{n}/S{n}/C{n}} → Score {N}
#
# **Transcricao:**
# > {TRANSCRICAO_COMPLETA}
#
# ---

# ===============================================================================
# FILE ORGANIZATION
# ===============================================================================

# COMPACT OUTPUT (this template):
#   output/curated/{source-slug}/momentos.md
#   - Top 50 moments with full transcriptions
#   - MUST be smaller than input transcript
#   - Human can scan Quick Scan table in 2 minutes
#   - AI can parse YAML frontmatter + structured sections

# ARCHIVE (all moments):
#   _temp/mining/{source-slug}/all_moments_merged.md
#   - ALL extracted moments (raw, unfiltered)
#   - Reference only — not for direct consumption
#   - Contains moments that didn't make the top 50

# SUB-AGENT PARTS (temporary):
#   _temp/mining/{source-slug}/part_01.md ... part_NN.md
#   - Individual sub-agent outputs
#   - Kept for audit trail

# ===============================================================================
# SIZE GUIDELINES
# ===============================================================================

# | Input Size | Expected Compact Output | Ratio |
# |------------|------------------------|-------|
# | 100 KB     | 10-15 KB               | ~12%  |
# | 200 KB     | 20-30 KB               | ~13%  |
# | 400 KB     | 40-60 KB               | ~12%  |
# | 800 KB     | 60-80 KB               | ~9%   |
#
# RULE: compact output MUST be < input size. Typical: 10-15% of input.
